steps: Vote to dissolve per operating agreement or unanimous vote of members
If not unanimous, file Certificate of Dissolution (Form LLC-3) first
Wind up business affairs and settle debts
File final tax return (Form 568) with Franchise Tax Board
Obtain Certificate of Tax Clearance from Franchise Tax Board if needed
File Certificate of Cancellation (Form LLC-4/7) with Secretary of State within 12 months of filing final tax return
llc.notes: No filing fee for dissolution/cancellation. If all members vote to dissolve, only Form LLC-4/7 is needed. If not unanimous, file Form LLC-3 (Certificate of Dissolution) first, then Form LLC-4/7. In-person filing at Sacramento office incurs a $15 special handling fee.

steps: Board of directors adopts resolution recommending dissolution
Shareholders approve dissolution by majority vote
Wind up business affairs, notify creditors, and settle debts
File final tax returns with Franchise Tax Board
Obtain Certificate of Tax Clearance from Franchise Tax Board
File Certificate of Dissolution (Form DISS STK) with Secretary of State within 12 months of filing final tax return
corporation.notes: No filing fee for dissolution. Certificate of Tax Clearance from FTB is required. In-person filing at Sacramento office incurs a $15 special handling fee. Short form dissolution available for corporations that have not issued shares.

tax.notes: Certificate of Tax Clearance from FTB is required before or concurrent with dissolution filing. File all delinquent tax returns and pay all balances including penalties, fees, and interest. LLCs must pay the $800 annual tax until cancellation is filed with SoS. Dissolution forms must be filed with SoS within 12 months of filing the final tax return.

timeline.waitingPeriods: Must file dissolution within 12 months of final tax return

requirements.employeeNotification: California WARN Act requires 60 days notice for 75+ employees
requirements.creditorNotification: Must notify known creditors in writing; unknown creditors may be notified by publication
requirements.registeredAgentNotes: Agent for service of process must be maintained until dissolution is complete
requirements.windingUpPeriod: Reasonable time to wind up affairs; dissolution must be filed within 12 months of final tax return
requirements.boardOrMemberApproval: Majority vote of members (LLC) or shareholders (Corp) required; unanimous consent allows simplified LLC cancellation

includes: Every required form with direct download links
